---
title: "Geminos March19"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
```


# Nonlinear dataset

```{r}
set.seed(1)
n <- 2000

# ----------------------------
# 1. Covariates
# ----------------------------
age <- runif(n, 20, 30)

genre_preference <- sample(
  c("Action","Drama","Comedy","SciFi","Romance"),
  n, replace=TRUE
)

major_release <- sample(
  c("sports","politics","celebrity","tech","news"),
  n, replace=TRUE
)

genre_num <- as.numeric(factor(genre_preference))
release_num <- as.numeric(factor(major_release))

# ----------------------------
# 2. Treatment (NONLINEAR PS)
# ----------------------------
linpred <- 
  0.5*sin(age/3) + 
  0.3*(genre_num^2)/10 +
  -0.4*log(release_num + 1) +
  0.2*(age * genre_num)/30

p <- plogis(linpred)

RS <- rbinom(n, 1, p)

# ----------------------------
# 3. Pre outcomes (NONLINEAR trend)
# ----------------------------
min_1 <- 
  2*sin(age/4) +
  0.5*(genre_num^1.5) +
  -0.3*(release_num^2)/5 +
  rnorm(n,0,2) + 30

min_2 <- 
  3*sin(age/5) +
  0.7*(genre_num^1.5) +
  -0.4*(release_num^2)/5 +
  0.5*age +
  rnorm(n,0,2) + 30

# ----------------------------
# 4. Treatment effect (heterogeneous!)
# ----------------------------
tau <- 
  1.5 + 
  0.5*sin(age/2) +
  0.3*(genre_num == 1) + 
  -0.4*(genre_num == 2)

# ----------------------------
# 5. Post outcome
# ----------------------------
min_3 <- 
  min_2 +
  tau * RS +
  5*sin(age/3) +          
  rnorm(n,0,2)

# ----------------------------
# 6. Dataset
# ----------------------------
data <- data.frame(
  age, genre_preference, major_release,
  RS, min_1, min_2, min_3
)

data$diff <- data$min_3 - data$min_2
```

# unconditional DID
```{r}
ETT_1 <- 
  (mean(data$min_3[data$RS==1]) - 
   mean(data$min_2[data$RS==1])) -
  (mean(data$min_3[data$RS==0]) - 
   mean(data$min_2[data$RS==0]))

ETT_1
```


# Conditional DID
## misspecify because of non-linear + interaction
```{r}
control_model <- lm(
  diff ~ age + genre_preference + major_release,
  data = subset(data, RS==0)
)

m0_pred <- predict(control_model,
                   newdata = subset(data, RS==1))

ETT_2 <- mean(data$diff[data$RS==1]) - mean(m0_pred)
ETT_2
```

# 3.Non-parametric DID

```{r}
library(mgcv)

ps_model <- gam(
  RS ~ s(age) + genre_preference + major_release,
  family = binomial,
  data = data
)

data$ps <- predict(ps_model, type="response")

ETT_3 <- mean(
  (data$diff / mean(data$RS)) *
  (data$RS - data$ps) /
  (1 - data$ps)
)

ETT_3
```

```{r}
# Outcome vs Age
ggplot(data, aes(x = age, y = min_3)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", color = "red") +
  labs(title = "Nonlinear Relationship between Age and Outcome (Post)")
```


```{r}
# Diff vs Age
ggplot(data, aes(x = age, y = diff, color = factor(RS))) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_smooth(se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Treatment Effect Heterogeneity",
       color = "RS")
```
